scripts.generate:api:miniprogram: openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/openapi.json -g typescript-fetch -o miniprogram/api/generated && find miniprogram/api/generated -name '*.ts' | xargs sed -i '' '1s|^|// @ts-nocheck\n|' && sed -i '' 's/overriddenInit\.body instanceof URLSearchParams/typeof URLSearchParams !== "undefined" \&\& overriddenInit.body instanceof URLSearchParams/g' miniprogram/api/generated/runtime.ts
scripts.generate:api:admin: openapi-generator-cli generate -i openapi/openapi.json -g typescript-fetch -o admin/src/api/generated && find admin/src/api/generated -name '*.ts' | xargs sed -i '' '1s|^|// @ts-nocheck\n|'
scripts.generate:api: npm run generate:api:miniprogram && npm run generate:api:admin
